name: Black Widow

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It steps in with a fast direct bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Perfect-block it or step out of the line as soon as the body commits.
attacks.notes: Even its simplest hit can activate venom.

attacks.name: 3-Combo Bite
attacks.tell: It chains three fast bites with almost no downtime.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not punish the first hit; wait for the whole chain to end.
attacks.notes: Its cramped dens make it very easy to get clipped by the full chain.

attacks.name: 5-Combo Bite
attacks.tell: At lower health it speeds up and extends the sequence into a five-hit chain.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not try to steal your turn back too early; greed gets you killed here.
attacks.notes: This is effectively its high-speed phase, even if it is not a formal boss.

attacks.name: Charged Lunge
attacks.tell: It draws back before lunging much farther forward.
attacks.howToAvoid: Sidestep it; backpedaling straight away often is not enough.
attacks.notes: If it connects, the raw damage alone is already nasty even before venom ticks start.

attacks.name: Web Attack
attacks.tell: It fires a web projectile similar to an orb weaver shot.
attacks.howToAvoid: Break line of sight, avoid it, and kill the widowling before the mother can consume it.
attacks.notes: It summons a widowling. If the widow kills it afterward, she gains major buffs.

description: A legendary late-yard spider and arguably the deadliest non-boss creature in the game. Its resistances make it a serious test even for endgame builds.
behavior: It lives alone inside cramped silk dens and never wanders outside. Its attacks resemble a mix of wolf spider and orb weaver moves, but faster, heavier, and even quicker as its health drops.
interactionWithPlayer: It is aggressive on sight and punishes mistakes brutally. All of its attacks can apply venom, and it can also summon a widowling with a web shot, then eat it for regeneration and attack speed.
interactionWithCreatures: It stays passive toward widowlings while calm. Once combat starts, it will actively seek to kill them itself for buffs if the player does not remove them first.
strategy: Sour is practically the intended answer. Tactically, the first priority is denying the summoned widowling meal and not overextending in small dens where the low-health speed-up becomes brutal.
respawnInfo: 7 days by default. In the Brawny Boy Bin it takes 3 days.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 110
3-Combo Bite: 80
5-Combo Bite: 75
Charged Lunge: 150
Web Attack: 100

specialTraits: Venom bypasses Mithridatism and can stack alongside an additional poison effect. If it eats a nearby widowling, it gains 30 health per second for 10 seconds and +50% attack speed.
